pakSettings.author: Management Pack Builder
pakSettings.name: Synology NAS
pakSettings.description: Monitors a Synology DiskStation NAS running DSM 7.x. Collects rootdevice health (CPU, memory, temperature, uptime), storage topology (pools, volumes, disks), pervolume IO, and iSCSI LUN inventory. Uses discrete perentity storage API endpoints (SYNO.Core.Storage.) matching the knownvalid reference build. Designed for DS1520 but applicable to any adminaccessible DSM 7 unit.

configuration.label: Hostname
configuration.description: The hostname used to connect to the target API.

configuration.label: Port
configuration.description: The port used to connect to the target API.

configuration.label: Connection Timeout (s)
configuration.description: The maximum number of seconds to wait for a response from the endpoint.

configuration.label: Maximum Concurrent Requests
configuration.description: The maximum number of request that can be run simultaneously.

configuration.label: Maximum Retries
configuration.description: The maximum number of times a call to an endpoint will be retried if it fails.

configuration.label: SSL Configuration
configuration.description: The SSL mode to use when connecting to the target. Can be configured without SSL (No SSL), to use SSL but do not verify the target's certificate (No Verify), or to use SSL and verify the target's certificate (Verify).

configuration.label: Minimum VMware Aria Operations Severity
configuration.description: The minimum event severity to collect.
